summary: menu items --category now accepts either the category slug or display name; menuItemRow exposes both category and category_slug.
reason: The flag was labelled 'category slug' but the filter compared display names only, so a user copying a slug from `menu categories` output got zero results. Fixed by tracking both name and slug per item and matching against either form case-insensitively. Verified live with both `--category chow-mein-chow-fen-2` and `--category 'Chow Mein & Chow Fen'`.
